title: ZAPIER API REQUEST TO MONDAY.COM (INVALID_GRAPHQL_REQUEST) ERROR

posts.author: johnz02 (John)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I keep getting the following error when run a API request block in Zapier.

" Failed to create a http request in monday.com
(INVALID_GRAPHQL_REQUEST) Invalid GraphQL request"

I have tested the query in the Monday API Playground an
